patch.value: Consolidate history commands: history-redact/history-repair/history-compact/activity/restore under pm history subcommands

pm history <id> stays the default view; history-redact -> pm history redact, history-repair -> pm history repair, history-compact -> pm history compact, activity -> pm history activity, restore -> pm history restore (old spellings aliased). Duplicate check: no existing history-namespace item; history feature items are all closed deliverables.

pm history gains redact/repair/compact/activity/restore subcommands with flag parity; old top-level spellings alias-shimmed with identical output; default pm history <id> view unchanged; contracts/MCP/completions/docs regenerated; existing history-* specs pass via aliases
